text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: How's this song, then?! Hm, hm, hmmm, yeah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely not. In any case, you know they don't
play special entrance songs.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But music gets you fired up and hella energized!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It gets rid of all your worries too! Like your fear of
men!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's none of your concern. My difficulty with
men has nothing to do with you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, it's not necessary. I'm leaving. I have to
start training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Plus... Well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You and I are different.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And she's gone. Sigh... Hmm... picking a song is tough.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You can help me think! I need to come up with an
entrance song for Dober!
choice_data_list: Why does she need an entrance song?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's because... Hmmm... Here, come with
me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Just look at Dober run! Look how sharp she is!
She runs like the wind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa isn't wrong. Just ahead of us,
Mejiro Dober is running without a single wasted
movement.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I've just gotta beat her when she's giving it her all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If she runs like this at a real race, it'll be the best
race ever!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Right! If only she could run with all her might and
not worry about who's watching!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Come to think of it, I do remember hearing
about Dober being nervous or having trouble
around men or something.
choice_data_list:
It must be stressful having so many people
watching.

It must be stressful having so many people
watching.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. I understand how she feels.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
When I was a kid, I was a real crybaby and a total
chicken without my mask. There was no way I
could go in front of a crowd.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And that's exactly why I gotta help her!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Dober needs something to give her courage too.
Just like me with my mask!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's why she needs an entrance song! Do you
have any recommendations?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Something exciting, fun, and energizing! That
kinda song!
choice_data_list: What about one of the winning concert songs?
What if she had a cheerleading squad?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Great idea! Something she recognizes would
make her feel more relaxed too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A winning concert song would definitely get her
spirits up!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Okay, I've got it! This song is perfect for Dober!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Dober! We picked an entrance song for you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You still haven't given up on that?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Of course not! This song is gonna give you so
much courage and power!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Horsegirl! Pyoi! Legend!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I guess I'll bite. Why that song?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It really gets me going when I hear it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Try singin' this song when you take on your next
race! I just know it'll keep your spirits high!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Are you kidding me? I told you already, you
and I aren't the sa—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But it'll give you the kind of courage I get when I
put on my mask!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now kiss wimpy crybaby Dober goodbye and
come race against me for real!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I don't think I'm a wimp or a crybaby...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But... maybe you're right. Maybe we aren't that
different, after all.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There's a smile! Does that mean you like the song
I picked?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Absolutely not.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober looks exasperated, but her
awkward smile draws a smile out of El Condor
Pasa as well.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I gotcha! In that case, I'll write some lyrics
myself!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Something fiery and hella passionate is probably
best, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an hour of thought, the song for Mejiro
Dober is finished!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Go! Go! Hella quick! ♪ Fighting spirit!
Drooopkick! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Fight! Fight! Beat 'em all! Bigger they are, harder
they fall! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Run! Run! Everyone, move over! Whooo's that?
It's Mejiro Dober! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What in the world? What kind of song is that?! It's making me lose energy, if anything! Cut it out!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh! So you mean it's making you relaxed?! We
did it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I just know you'll be hella fast with this cheer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely not! And since when is it okay to
dropkick people in a race?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Details, details! For now, let's go try it out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that El Condor Pasa isn't going to give
up, Mejiro Dober reluctantly heads back to the
course for a run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Some time later...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No way... My time actually improved...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Incredible! I was sooo excited just watching you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: W-well... I guess I was able to relax a bit...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
When I heard that strange song... and those
lyrics...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Heh... hehehe.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. Gets you fired up, right?! I'm glad you like
it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Now, how about you and I have a ra—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I think I'm done for today. Maybe next time.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though she ultimately refuses to use the
cheer as an entrance song, Mejiro Dober looks
cheered up, and the two of them share a laugh.
